name: Prodigy (Annotation Tool by Explosion AI)

auth.notes: License key for installation; web UI no auth by default

performance.notes: Local web server; active learning reduces annotation load; fast UI

agent_readiness.notes: The gold standard annotation tool for NLP data by Explosion (spaCy creators). prodigy ner.manual my_dataset blank:en ./texts.jsonl --label ORG,PERSON. Active learning: prodigy ner.teach reduces annotation burden. Custom recipes in Python: @prodigy.recipe. JSONL format for annotations. Integrates with spaCy training. LLM-assisted annotation: prodigy ner.llm.correct. Text, NER, relations, spans, classification, image, audio. SQLite DB backend for annotations. Export to spaCy DocBin or JSONL. Commercial license but one-time purchase.

gotchas: Commercial license ($390-990) — not free like Label Studio
Primarily designed for spaCy ecosystem (though usable standalone)
Active learning requires running models locally
best_when: NLP annotation (NER, text classification, relations) for spaCy training
Active learning to reduce annotation cost
Teams willing to pay for best-in-class annotation UX
avoid_when: Free annotation tool needed (Label Studio, Argilla are free)
Non-NLP annotation (images, bounding boxes — other tools better)
Managed cloud annotation at scale (Label Studio Enterprise better)
summary: Prodigy is Explosion AI's commercial annotation tool — the best NLP annotation UX available. prodigy ner.manual my_dataset blank:en texts.jsonl --label ORG. Active learning with ner.teach. LLM-assisted annotation. Custom Python recipes. Integrates directly with spaCy training. SQLite backend, JSONL export. One-time license ($390-990). Not free but best-in-class for NLP annotation. Free alternatives: Label Studio, Argilla.
